title: Ranked SMP
description: Higher rank = better boosts, unranked players stay vanilla.
body:
## Ranked SMP System

This plugin assigns special ranks to the top 20 players, from **Rank 1** to **Rank 20**. Players outside the top 20 remain completely vanilla with no bonuses.

### Perks by Rank

**Hearts**
- Extra health increases gradually with rank.  
- Rank 20 receives a small boost.  
- Rank 1 has the highest number of bonus hearts.

**Effect Duration**
- Potion effects last longer the higher your rank.  
- Rank 20 gets a slight increase.  
- Rank 1 enjoys effects lasting up to twice as long.

**Inventory Slots**
- Ranks 11–20 have normal inventory.  
- Starting at Rank 10, players unlock extra slots.  
- Higher ranks gain more inventory space.

**XP Gain**
- XP is earned faster as rank improves.  
- Rank 20 gets a minor bonus.  
- Rank 1 gains XP extremely quickly.
